jsonLd.title: Yatra is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra family as a E-commerce Executive in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra:
Yatra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra!
